ontology_cli.description: Core ontology entity/relation CRUD with validation

neo4j_adapter.description: Neo4j Aura sync with schema initialization

vertex_graphrag.description: Vertex AI GraphRAG with semantic search

unified_cli.description: Single entry point for all commands

deployment_paths.aura_free: Create instance at console.neo4j.io → set NEO4J_URI + NEO4J_PASSWORD → run neo4j_adapter.py sync
deployment_paths.aura_pro: Use aura_api.py with AURA_CLIENT_ID + AURA_CLIENT_SECRET → auto-provision → sync
deployment_paths.gcp_terraform: cd terraform → cp terraform.tfvars.example terraform.tfvars → terraform init && terraform apply
deployment_paths.vertex_ai: Set GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT → run vertex_graphrag.py for embeddings + content generation
